name: EdwEdwIncmWMbrCntsExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH Step1 AS (SELECT CNT.PROD_ID, CNT.ACTVTY_YR_MO_SK, CNT.CLS_SK, CNT.CLS_PLN_SK, CNT.GRP_SK, CNT.PROD_SK, CNT.SUBGRP_SK, CAST(SUM(CNT.MBR_CT) AS DECIMAL(6,1)) AS MBR_CT, CNT.CLS_ID, CNT.CLS_PLN_ID, CNT.GRP_ID, CNT.SUBGRP_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_RCST_CT_F CNT GROUP BY CNT.PROD_ID, CNT.ACTVTY_YR_MO_SK, CNT.CLS_SK, CNT.CLS_PLN_SK, CNT.GRP_SK, CNT.PROD_SK, CNT.SUBGRP_SK, CNT.CLS_ID, CNT.CLS_PLN_ID, CNT.GRP_ID, CNT.SUBGRP_ID), StepNA AS (SELECT 'NA' AS PROD_ID, 'NA' AS ACTVTY_YR_MO_SK, 1 AS CLS_SK, 1 AS CLS_PLN_SK, 1 AS GRP_SK, 1 AS PROD_SK, 1 AS SUBGRP_SK, 1 AS MBR_CT, 'NA' AS CLS_ID, 'NA' AS CLS_PLN_ID, 'NA' AS GRP_ID, 'NA' AS SUBGRP_ID), StepUNK AS (SELECT 'UNK' AS PROD_ID, 'UNK' AS ACTVTY_YR_MO_SK, 0 AS CLS_SK, 0 AS CLS_PLN_SK, 0 AS GRP_SK, 0 AS PROD_SK, 0 AS SUBGRP_SK, 0 AS MBR_CT, 'UNK' AS CLS_ID, 'UNK' AS CLS_PLN_ID, 'UNK' AS GRP_ID, 'UNK' AS SUBGRP_ID) SELECT * FROM Step1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM StepNA UNION ALL SELECT * FROM StepUNK

Description:
****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwIncmWMbrCntsExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pulls summarized counts from edw ids  MBR_RCST_CT_F and loads to  W_MBR_RCST
  W_MBR_RCST is replaced during load.      

INPUTS:
                       
                EDW:   MBR_RCST_CT_F
            
TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  Summarize all member counts by group, subgroup, class, class plan and product.   used for income allocations
 

OUTPUTS: 
                  An EDW load file.  


MODIFICATIONS:
              Sharon Andrew 02/07/2005  - Originally Programmed


MODIFICATIONS:

Developer           Date                 Project/Altiris #                                      Change Description                                                                                                        Project                                    Code Reviewer           Date Reviewed       
------------------        --------------------     ------------------------                                       -----------------------------------------------------------------------                                                                ----------                                    -------------------------------   ----------------------------      
Kimberly Doty     2010-10-04        TTR 551                                               Modified column MBR_CT from Decimal 6 to Decimal 32 to accommodate                EnterpriseNewDevl                   Steph Goddard           10/01/2010
                                                                                                                  DataStage's use of decimal 31 when summing a decimal field
Syed Husseini    2013-10-02        5114                                                      Newly Programmed                                                                                                     EnterpriseWrhsDevl                  Peter Marshall             12/10/2013

Annotations:
Pulls summarized counts from EDW MBR_RCST_CT_F and loads to  W_MBR_RCST

Job Name:
EdwIncmWMbrCntsExtr
